files.patch:
@@ -576,5 +576,10 @@
     "quote": "I get excited to poke my @clawdbot every morning and that is as weird a feeling as I've ever had with computers in 20+ years of game development. It's freeing in a weird way as a creative person that's hard to describe! I can just do things!",
     "author": "theysayheygreg",
     "url": "https://x.com/theysayheygreg/status/2014149781426229541"
+  },
+  {
+    "quote": "It is the first ever real assistant, but that word has been corroded and using it would significantly downplay what it really can do for you. For me it is like having a really smart and capable tech employee living on my desktop.",
+    "author": "Crucialhunter",
+    "url": "https://x.com/Crucialhunter/status/2014232711137804441"
   }
 ]
\ No newline at end of file
